message:
fix(acfs-global): validate state-file ACFS_BIN_DIR against target home

Extends the bin-dir validator pattern from `scripts/lib/stack.sh`
into the top-level `scripts/acfs-global` direct-exec entry point.
Previously the direct-exec path trusted whatever `ACFS_BIN_DIR` was
present in the environment or in the ACFS state file; now an override
that points at a different user's home (or at a hinted tool dir whose
`$HOME` prefix disagrees with the resolved target home) is rejected
and forced back through the default `<target_home>/.local/bin` logic
downstream.

New helpers
-----------
- `validate_bin_dir_for_home(bin_dir, base_home)`:
  Accepts the override if it lives at or under `base_home`. Otherwise:
  - Strips the known tool suffixes (`/.local/bin`, `/.acfs/bin`,
    `/.bun/bin`, `/.cargo/bin`, `/.atuin/bin`, `/go/bin`,
    `/google-cloud-sdk/bin`) and rejects if the stripped "home" hint
    disagrees with `base_home`. This catches the common mistake of
    an operator exporting `ACFS_BIN_DIR=/home/alice/.local/bin` while
    running the installer against `bob`'s home.
  - Iterates `getent passwd` and `/etc/passwd` to reject the override
    if it falls under *any* other user's home. An override under no
    user's home (e.g. `/opt/tools/bin`) is still accepted, so
    administrators can explicitly point the installer at a system
    location.
- `read_validated_bin_dir_from_state_file(state_file, target_home)`:
  Wrapper that reads the bin-dir string from `ACFS_STATE_FILE`, pipes
  it through `validate_bin_dir_for_home`, and returns the validated
  value (or nothing). If `target_home` is empty the helper re-derives
  it from the state file via the existing
  `resolve_target_home_from_state_hint` so the validator always has a
  baseline to compare against.

Call-site updates
-----------------
- `prepare_runtime_context_from_acfs_home` now reads the state bin dir
  through `read_validated_bin_dir_from_state_file "$ACFS_STATE_FILE"
  "$runtime_target_home"` instead of the raw `read_bin_dir_from_state_file`,
  so a runtime re-exec with a poisoned state file doesn't carry a
  cross-user bin dir forward.
- `main()` runs an incoming `ACFS_BIN_DIR` through the validator
  before anything else; a rejected value is blanked out and the
  existing "recover from state" loop runs as if no override was set.
  The recovery loop itself switches to the validated reader so each
  candidate state file is vetted against the expected home before
  being adopted.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -220,6 +220,59 @@ read_bin_dir_from_state_file() {
     return 1
 }
 
+validate_bin_dir_for_home() {
+    local bin_dir="${1:-}"
+    local base_home="${2:-}"
+    local passwd_line=""
+    local passwd_home=""
+    local hinted_home=""
+
+    bin_dir="$(sanitize_abs_nonroot_path "$bin_dir" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+    [[ -n "$bin_dir" ]] || return 1
+    base_home="$(sanitize_abs_nonroot_path "$base_home" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+
+    if [[ -n "$base_home" ]] && [[ "$bin_dir" == "$base_home" || "$bin_dir" == "$base_home/"* ]]; then
+        printf '%s\n' "$bin_dir"
+        return 0
+    fi
+
+    case "$bin_dir" in
+        */.local/bin) hinted_home="${bin_dir%/.local/bin}" ;;
+        */.acfs/bin) hinted_home="${bin_dir%/.acfs/bin}" ;;
+        */.bun/bin) hinted_home="${bin_dir%/.bun/bin}" ;;
+        */.cargo/bin) hinted_home="${bin_dir%/.cargo/bin}" ;;
+        */.atuin/bin) hinted_home="${bin_dir%/.atuin/bin}" ;;
+        */go/bin) hinted_home="${bin_dir%/go/bin}" ;;
+        */google-cloud-sdk/bin) hinted_home="${bin_dir%/google-cloud-sdk/bin}" ;;
+    esac
+    hinted_home="$(sanitize_abs_nonroot_path "$hinted_home" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+    if [[ -n "$hinted_home" ]] && [[ -n "$base_home" ]] && [[ "$hinted_home" != "$base_home" ]]; then
+        return 1
+    fi
+
+    while IFS= read -r passwd_line; do
+        passwd_home="$(sanitize_abs_nonroot_path "$(printf '%s\n' "$passwd_line" | cut -d: -f6)" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+        [[ -n "$passwd_home" ]] || continue
+        [[ -n "$base_home" && "$passwd_home" == "$base_home" ]] && continue
+        if [[ "$bin_dir" == "$passwd_home" || "$bin_dir" == "$passwd_home/"* ]]; then
+            return 1
+        fi
+    done < <(getent_passwd_entry 2>/dev/null || true)
+
+    if [[ -r /etc/passwd ]]; then
+        while IFS= read -r passwd_line; do
+            passwd_home="$(sanitize_abs_nonroot_path "$(printf '%s\n' "$passwd_line" | cut -d: -f6)" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+            [[ -n "$passwd_home" ]] || continue
+            [[ -n "$base_home" && "$passwd_home" == "$base_home" ]] && continue
+            if [[ "$bin_dir" == "$passwd_home" || "$bin_dir" == "$passwd_home/"* ]]; then
+                return 1
+            fi
+        done < /etc/passwd
+    fi
+
+    printf '%s\n' "$bin_dir"
+}
+
 state_file_path_user_home() {
     local state_file="$1"
     local state_home=""
@@ -426,6 +479,24 @@ resolve_target_home_from_state_hint() {
     printf '%s\n' "$candidate_home"
 }
 
+read_validated_bin_dir_from_state_file() {
+    local state_file="$1"
+    local target_home="${2:-}"
+    local candidate_bin=""
+
+    [[ -f "$state_file" ]] || return 1
+
+    target_home="$(existing_abs_nonroot_dir "$target_home" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+    if [[ -z "$target_home" ]]; then
+        target_home="$(resolve_target_home_from_state_hint "$state_file" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+    fi
+
+    candidate_bin="$(read_bin_dir_from_state_file "$state_file" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+    candidate_bin="$(validate_bin_dir_for_home "$candidate_bin" "$target_home" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+    [[ -n "$candidate_bin" ]] || return 1
+    printf '%s\n' "$candidate_bin"
+}
+
 resolve_direct_exec_target_home() {
     local preferred_acfs_home="${1:-}"
     local candidate_home=""
@@ -520,7 +591,7 @@ prepare_runtime_context_from_acfs_home() {
     [[ -n "$runtime_target_home" ]] && TARGET_HOME="$runtime_target_home"
     ACFS_HOME="$acfs_home"
     ACFS_STATE_FILE="$state_file"
-    state_bin_dir="$(read_bin_dir_from_state_file "$ACFS_STATE_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+    state_bin_dir="$(read_validated_bin_dir_from_state_file "$ACFS_STATE_FILE" "$runtime_target_home" 2>/dev/null || true)"
     ACFS_BIN_DIR="${state_bin_dir:-}"
     ACFS_RUNTIME_TARGET_USER="${validated_target_user:-}"
 
@@ -858,6 +929,9 @@ main() {
         validate_target_user_or_die "$target_user"
     fi
 
+    ACFS_BIN_DIR="$(validate_bin_dir_for_home "${ACFS_BIN_DIR:-}" "${TARGET_HOME:-}" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+    export ACFS_BIN_DIR
+
     if [[ -z "${ACFS_BIN_DIR:-}" ]]; then
         local state_candidate=""
         local expected_home=""
@@ -874,7 +948,7 @@ main() {
             if [[ -n "$expected_home" ]] && ! state_file_matches_target_home "$state_candidate" "$expected_home"; then
                 continue
             fi
-            ACFS_BIN_DIR="$(read_bin_dir_from_state_file "$state_candidate" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+            ACFS_BIN_DIR="$(read_validated_bin_dir_from_state_file "$state_candidate" "$expected_home" 2>/dev/null || true)"
             [[ -n "$ACFS_BIN_DIR" ]] && break
         done
         export ACFS_BIN_DIR
